column1: I believe Larry was a friend of__________ . (YOU)
He is not the___________boy in our group. He is as__________as you are. (TALL/TALL)
The Arctic Ocean is the_____________of the oceans. (COLD)
Which is______________: the mosquito or the scorpion? (POISONOUS)
"I must do something" she said to_________ . (SHE)
